rows.salesforce_capability: Client navigation, object tabs, and list/detail/right-panel workspace
rows.boundary: Client workspace is API-backed and fail-closed; no static local data fallback.

Runtime facade writes now create canonical Master Data Account projection; registration number and Matter shortcut fields remain hidden.

rows.salesforce_capability: Salesforce Contact object read/create/patch and Account-Contact relationship read
rows.boundary: Contact create writes canonical Person/ContactPoint/Relationship state; merge proposal and approved execute are route-backed, owner-gated, and hide raw contact values.

rows.boundary: Selected Matter context drives downstream sections; broader mass update remains backend-first.

rows.salesforce_capability: Matter activity, calendar, deadline board, and Matter Channel
rows.boundary: Activity, calendar, deadline, and channel controls are route-backed; external channel/calendar provider effects remain provider-blocked until owner approval and provider receipt.

rows.salesforce_capability: Matter DMS files, Vault inventory, search, audit, document facade, document builder, and email composer
rows.boundary: Document bytes, raw storage paths, raw body text, raw contact values, and external provider payloads stay hidden; publish/send controls expose owner/provider blocked states.

rows.salesforce_capability: Client/Matter import wizard, data mapping, dry-run, owner-blocked execute, rollback, and safe error report
rows.boundary: Import wizard controls are route-backed and local-test-visible; execute remains owner-blocked, rollback remains receipt-bound, and raw rows/file bytes/provider enablement/fake success stay hidden.

rows.boundary: People 권한 관리 controls are route-backed and local-test-visible; permission grants, revocations, physical schema mutation, provider revocation, production approval, and trust claims remain owner/provider-blocked.
